case_title: DOUGLAS LEE VS. LUIS A. TAYOB ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DOUGLAS

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT TAYOB, LUIS A. AKA LUIS TUYUB RASUUEZ, CARLES A AKA CARLOS VAZQUEZ CHULIM, GUILLERMON DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DOUGLAS SERVED NOV-29-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I-X

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DOUGLAS SERVED NOV-29-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT RASUUEZ, CARLES A AKA CARLOS VAZQUEZ
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, DOUGLAS SERVED NOV-29-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CHULIM, GUILLERMON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYOB, LUIS A. AKA LUIS TUYUB RASUUEZ, CARLES A AKA CARLOS VAZQUEZ CHULIM, GUILLERMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1345 CALIFORNIA STREET #2 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 $8,818.75 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $720.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,338.75, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TAYOB, LUIS A. AKA LUIS TUYUB RASUUEZ, CARLES A AKA CARLOS VAZQUEZ CHULIM, GUILLERMON

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYOB, LUIS A. AKA LUIS TUYUB RASUUEZ, CARLES A AKA CARLOS VAZQUEZ CHULIM, GUILLERMON
